feed.title: Kehinde Ogunlowo — DevSecOps & AI Agent Engineering
feed.subtitle: Articles on multi-cloud architecture, DevSecOps, and AI agent systems.

entry.title: Multi-Cloud Zero Trust Architecture: A Practical Framework
entry.summary: Implementing zero trust security across AWS, Azure, and GCP with unified identity federation, micro-segmentation, and continuous verification.

entry.title: Production RAG Pipelines on AWS: From Prototype to Scale
entry.summary: Building retrieval-augmented generation pipelines with Amazon Bedrock, OpenSearch Serverless, and Lambda for enterprise knowledge systems.

entry.title: Terraform EKS Complete Guide: Production-Ready Clusters
entry.summary: A comprehensive walkthrough for deploying production-grade EKS clusters with Terraform, covering networking, IRSA, and GitOps integration.

entry.title: Azure Sentinel SOC Automation: SOAR Playbooks at Scale
entry.summary: Automating security operations with Azure Sentinel, Logic Apps, and custom detection rules for real-time threat response across hybrid environments.

entry.title: AI Agents in Enterprise DevOps: Beyond the Hype
entry.summary: Designing autonomous AI agent systems for CI/CD optimization, incident response, and infrastructure management in enterprise environments.

entry.title: FinOps Multi-Cloud Cost Optimization: Strategies That Work
entry.summary: Practical FinOps strategies for reducing multi-cloud spend by 40% using tagging policies, right-sizing, and automated governance frameworks.

entry.title: Production-Ready AKS Clusters with Terraform — Security, Networking, and Auto-Scaling
entry.summary: Deploy production AKS with Azure CNI Overlay, Workload Identity, Defender for Containers, and auto-scaling using Terraform.

entry.title: Building Autonomous AI Workflows with AWS Bedrock Agents and Knowledge Bases
entry.summary: Build autonomous AI agents on AWS Bedrock with knowledge bases, action groups, and Lambda integration using Terraform.

entry.title: Enterprise DevSecOps Pipeline Architecture for Multi-Cloud Deployments
entry.summary: Design enterprise DevSecOps pipelines with SAST, DAST, SCA, container scanning, and IaC scanning across AWS and Azure.

entry.title: GKE Autopilot with Terraform — Serverless Kubernetes on Google Cloud
entry.summary: Deploy GKE Autopilot with Gateway API, Workload Identity, and Binary Authorization using Terraform.

entry.title: Microsoft Entra ID for Enterprise Zero Trust IAM
entry.summary: Implement Zero Trust IAM with Entra Conditional Access, PIM, cross-cloud federation, and passwordless authentication.

entry.title: AWS VPC Networking with Terraform — Subnets, NAT, Transit Gateway, and PrivateLink
entry.summary: Design production AWS VPCs with multi-AZ subnets, Transit Gateway, PrivateLink, and Network Firewall using Terraform.

entry.title: Kubernetes Security Hardening — Pod Security, Network Policies, RBAC, and Runtime Protection
entry.summary: Harden Kubernetes clusters with Pod Security Standards, network policies, RBAC, OPA Gatekeeper, and Falco runtime detection.

entry.title: Building Azure Landing Zones with Terraform — Management Groups, Policy, and Hub-Spoke Networking
entry.summary: Build enterprise Azure landing zones with management group hierarchy, Azure Policy, and hub-spoke networking in Terraform.

entry.title: AWS Lambda Serverless Patterns with Terraform — Event-Driven Architecture at Scale
entry.summary: Build event-driven architectures with Lambda, SQS, DynamoDB Streams, EventBridge, and Step Functions using Terraform.

entry.title: Multi-Cloud Disaster Recovery Architecture with Terraform
entry.summary: Design multi-cloud DR with Pilot Light, Warm Standby, Aurora Global Database, and automated failover using Terraform.
